rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and provides specific recommendations for fixes, walking the chain end-to-end.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks its uncertainty by stating that it has not verified external claims but bases its critique on internal consistency alone.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers all aspects of the paper's active set without any drift or omissions.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; however, it points out several potential regressions in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides detailed explanations for each issue identified and suggests specific changes, indicating a high level of traceability.
